steps.title: Locate the y-intercept
steps.content: The y-intercept occurs where the line crosses the y-axis, at $x = 0$. From the graph, this is at $y = 250$.

steps.title: Interpret in context
steps.content: The x-axis represents months after purchase, so $x = 0$ means the bike was just purchased. The y-intercept value of \$250$ is therefore the estimated value at the moment of purchase. That matches choice A — A is correct.
